Title: Webhook Signature Verification Bypass
Description: Resolved by failing closed on Secret Manager lookup failure and adding verification tests.

Title: Architectural Drift in Secret Isolation
Description: Resolved by dynamically resolving and passing the tenant's dedicated GCP project ID when initializing SecretManagerClient.

Title: SQLite Temporary DB Leak Risk in DR drills
Description: Resolved by adding self-cleaning __init__ constructor to DRAdapter to automatically clean up orphan databases older than 5 minutes.

Title: Outbox Table RLS Policy
Description: The outbox table tenant_id column was previously nullable and RLS checks were bypassable. This has been resolved by converting the column to NOT NULL and backfilling existing records to 'system'.

Title: SQLite Database Leak during DR verify
Description: Temporary restore databases were previously not deleted on exceptions. This has been resolved by unlinking the SQLite temp files within a nested finally block.

Title: PMax Bid-Cap Safety Limit Mismatch
Description: GMC bid capping parameters have been locked to exactly 1000.00 INR (100_000 minor units) to align client and core system limits.

Title: Inverted GMC Penalty logic
Description: Penalty logic has been updated to use saturating penalty functions that cap GMC critical mismatch impacts safely instead of running unbounded subtractions.

Title: Missing sync_order action executor
Description: The sync_order webhook callback handler has been fully implemented in the ManageAdapter.execute method.

Title: Git worker credentials leakage / lack of isolation
Description: The git clone utility now securely embeds individual brand access tokens during checkout operations.
